visa_types.name: Work Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Please prepare the necessary documentation for your visa application using the following checklists: Link 
      
 Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased,Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/aut/travel-insurance)
The list of Schengen approved companies issuing travel insurance. Click Here.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[aut > ind > en > Table:Work Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are non-refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of INR 2524/-.
- All VISA Fees and Service Charge can be paid by Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay & UPI
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work not more than 90 days up to 3 months. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) is required. 
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work not more than 90 days up to 3 months. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) is required. 
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[aut > ind > en > Table:Work Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are non-refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of INR 2524/-.
- All VISA Fees and Service Charge can be paid by Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay & UPI

## For Applicants applying from Bhutan:
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fee are non-refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- The only acceptable method of payment for VISA Fee is by Cash in Bhutani Ngultrum.
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of BTN 4359/- (39.18 Euro's). It will be accepted in Cash.
- The applicable VISA Fee in Bhutani Ngultrum is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.

## Documents Required
Please prepare the necessary documentation for your visa application using the following checklists: Link 
      
 Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased,Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/aut/travel-insurance)
The list of Schengen approved companies issuing travel insurance. Click Here.

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
Important Note - Please note that it is Mandatory that Applicant’s bank statements for the last 3 months stamped & Signed by the bank.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > ind > en > Table:Work Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Work Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Work Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Work Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7ayFBcVcDhiL9DSudt02Fo/094d93378ca5218637b9825d2e67aad7/new-application-form.pdf)
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of submission. 
Declaration and Undertaking
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on declaration and undertaking. Representative or travel agent must bring signed declaration and undertaking at the time of submission.

- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.

## For Applicants applying from Bhutan:
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fee are non-refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- The only acceptable method of payment for VISA Fee is by Cash in Bhutani Ngultrum.

- The applicable VISA Fee in Bhutanese Ngultrum is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.

## Documents Required
Please prepare the necessary documentation for your visa application using the following checklists: Link
Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, same can be purchased via this Link (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/aut/travel-insurance)
To know the list of Schengen approved companies issuing travel insurance, click here Link
Visa Application Form (VAF) – can be downloaded from Download Form section.

## Instructions to download the forms:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
Or
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
Important Note - Please note that it is Mandatory that Applicant’s bank statements for the last 3 months stamped & Signed by the bank.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
Schengen Visa Application Form
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of submission.
Note- For the best experience, please fill out this form directly using web browser such as Google Chrome, Safari, or Mozilla Firefox.
Declaration and Undertaking
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on declaration and undertaking. Representative or travel agent must bring signed declaration and undertaking at the time of submission.

A Business Visa is given those who are doing business in Austria such as making sales or establishing contacts on behalf of a company outside India

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Student visas are given to bona fide students to pursue regular studies at recognized institutions in Austria for Study more than 90 days and up to 6 months. The visa is multiple entries and valid for the period of study as approved by the educational institution in Austria.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Student visas are given to bona fide students to pursue regular studies at recognized institutions in Austria for Study more than 90 days and up to 6 months. The visa is multiple entries and valid for the period of study as approved by the educational institution in Austria.

## Visa Fees

[aut > ind > en > Table:Student Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are non-refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of INR 2524/-.
- All VISA Fees and Service Charge can be paid by Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay.

## For Applicants applying from Bhutan:
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fee are non-refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- The only acceptable method of payment for VISA Fee is by Cash in Bhutani Ngultrum.
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of Euro 39.18. It will be accepted in Cash.
- The applicable VISA Fee in Bhutanese Ngultrum is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.

## Documents Required
Documents Required

Please prepare the necessary documentation for your visa application using the following checklists: Link
Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, same can be purchased via this Link (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/aut/travel-insurance)
To know the list of Schengen approved companies issuing travel insurance, click here Link
Visa Application Form (VAF) – can be downloaded from Download Form section.
- Editable/Digital VAF (Preferred)
- Non- Editable VAF

## Instructions to download the forms:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
Or
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
Important Note - Please note that it is Mandatory that Applicant’s bank statements for the last 3 months stamped & Signed by the bank.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > ind > en > Table:Student Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Student Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Student Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Student Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
National Visa Category (D) visa form
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of submission.

Declaration and Undertaking
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on Visa Declaration. Representative or travel agent must bring signed Visa Declaration at the time of submission.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This Visa is granted for those who want to do an internship in Austria. Those who intend to work longer than six months should apply for a residency-permit, and not for a visa.

visa_types.name: Short Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
Short Stay visa entitles an applicant, who does not hold a residence permit, to stay in Austria for an uninterrupted period or a total of successive periods of stays that does not exceed 90 days in every six months since the date of first entry. Austria is one of the 29 European countries forming the Schengen Area which have no border controls between them.
After scrutinizing the visa application by Embassy, your application may have the following
- Visa applied for is granted.
- Further documentation is requested.
- Applicant is requested to appear for a personal interview.
- The application is rejected.
- Short stay visa applications cannot be submitted more than 180 days in advance before the proposed date of travel.
Applications must be submitted at least 15 working days prior to the proposed date of travel. VFS Global is the outsourcing office responsible for the reception and release of passports for short stay visa applications.
“Important information for applications lodged in India: as of 01st March 2026, a travel medical insurance will be accepted only if it is issued by one of the insurance companies mentioned in the list of approved companies. Please read carefully the following document:
“List of approved Indian insurance companies”
visa_types.full_text:
Short Stay visa entitles an applicant, who does not hold a residence permit, to stay in Austria for an uninterrupted period or a total of successive periods of stays that does not exceed 90 days in every six months since the date of first entry. Austria is one of the 29 European countries forming the Schengen Area which have no border controls between them.
After scrutinizing the visa application by Embassy, your application may have the following
- Visa applied for is granted.
- Further documentation is requested.
- Applicant is requested to appear for a personal interview.
- The application is rejected.
- Short stay visa applications cannot be submitted more than 180 days in advance before the proposed date of travel.
Applications must be submitted at least 15 working days prior to the proposed date of travel. VFS Global is the outsourcing office responsible for the reception and release of passports for short stay visa applications.
“Important information for applications lodged in India: as of 01st March 2026, a travel medical insurance will be accepted only if it is issued by one of the insurance companies mentioned in the list of approved companies. Please read carefully the following document:
“List of approved Indian insurance companies”

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is given to those who are visiting Austria to shoot motion films.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is given to those who are visiting Austria to shoot motion films.

## Visa Fees

[aut > ind > en > Table:Film Crew Visa > Visa Fees 1]

## Please Note:
- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are non-refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of INR 2524/-.
- All VISA Fees and Service Charge can be paid by Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay & UPI

## For Applicants applying from Bhutan:
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fee are non-refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- The only acceptable method of payment for VISA Fee is by Cash in Bhutani Ngultrum.
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of Euro 39.18. It will be accepted in Cash.
- The applicable VISA Fee in Bhutanese Ngultrum is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.

## Documents Required
Documents required
Please prepare the necessary documentation for your visa application using the following checklists: Link

Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, same can be purchased via this Link (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/aut/travel-insurance)
To know the list of Schengen approved companies issuing travel insurance, click here Link
Visa Application Form (VAF) – can be downloaded from Download Form section.
- Editable/Digital VAF (Preferred)
- Non- Editable VAF

## Instructions to download the forms:
- Click on the
 
form
 
link
- When the form opens, save the form on your
 
computer.
Or
- Press the right button on
 
your mouse
 
on the required link.
- Select
 
Save Target As
 
from the list
- Save
 
the form on your computer.
Important Note - Please note that it is Mandatory that Applicant’s bank statements for the last 3 months stamped & Signed by the bank.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > ind > en > Table:Film Crew Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Film Crew Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Film Crew Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Film Crew Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
Schengen Visa Application Form
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of submission. 
Note- For the best experience, please fill out this form directly using web browser such as Google Chrome, Safari, or Mozilla Firefox.

Declaration and Undertaking
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on declaration and undertaking. Representative or travel agent must bring signed declaration and undertaking at the time of submission.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work  more than 90 days up to 6 months. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service  (AMS) is required. 
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work  more than 90 days up to 6 months. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service  (AMS) is required. 
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you plan to go to Austria on a trip taking part in cultural/sports and religious events for a period not to exceed 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you plan to go to Austria on a trip taking part in cultural/sports and religious events for a period not to exceed 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[aut > ind > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are non-refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of INR 2524/-.
- All VISA Fees and Service Charge can be paid by Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay & UPI

## For Applicants applying from Bhutan:
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fee are non-refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- The only acceptable method of payment for VISA Fee is by Cash in Bhutani Ngultrum.
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of Euro 39.18. It will be accepted in Cash.
- The applicable VISA Fee in Bhutanese Ngultrum is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.

## Documents Required
Please prepare the necessary documentation for your visa application using the following checklists: Link
Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, same can be purchased via this Link (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/aut/travel-insurance)
To know the list of Schengen approved companies issuing travel insurance, click here Link
Visa Application Form (VAF) – can be downloaded from Download Form section.
- Editable/Digital VAF (Preferred)
- Non- Editable VAF

## Instructions to download the forms:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
Or
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
Important Note - Please note that it is Mandatory that Applicant’s bank statements for the last 3 months stamped & Signed by the bank.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > ind > en > Table:Cultural, Sports Or Religious Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Cultural, Sports Or Religious Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Cultural, Sports Or Religious Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > ind > en > Table:Cultural, Sports Or Religious Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
Schengen Visa Application Form
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of submission.
Note- For the best experience, please fill out this form directly using web browser such as Google Chrome, Safari, or Mozilla Firefox.
Declaration and Undertaking
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on declaration and undertaking. Representative or travel agent must bring signed declaration and undertaking at the time of submission.

Applicable for citizens of Srilanka and Bangladesh only.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A Visitor visa is provided for those who are visiting family / friend in Austria. The inviter has to provide a guarantee on behalf of the applicant for this visa for Tourism more than 90 days and up to 6 months..
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A Visitor visa is provided for those who are visiting family / friend in Austria. The inviter has to provide a guarantee on behalf of the applicant for this visa for Tourism more than 90 days and up to 6 months..

## Visa Fees

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
National Visa Category (D) visa form
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of submission.

Declaration and Undertaking
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on Visa Declaration. Representative or travel agent must bring signed Visa Declaration at the time of submission.
